name: Merry Spritz Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 Foil-wrapped bar NESTLE Premier White baking bar (2 oz)
9 ounces NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt the NESTLE Premier White baking bar. Set aside to cool slightly.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter, sugar, and salt until creamy.
4. Blend in egg and vanilla extract.
5. Gradually blend in melted baking bar.
6. Gradually add flour, mixing until a dough forms.
7. Place the dough in a cookie press fitted with the desired plate.
8. Press the dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, decorating as desired with NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Morsels.
9. Bake for 7-9 minutes or until set. Allow to cool for 1 minute before removing from the cookie sheets and cooling completely.
10. Makes about 6 dozen cookies.
